---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
about: 
  template: jolla
  image: "images/profile-pic-bw.png"
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15rem
format:
  html: 
    page-layout: article
---





```{=html}
<!-- External Libraries -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/tippy.js@6/dist/tippy.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/aos@2.3.4/dist/aos.css" />

<script src="https://unpkg.com/@popperjs/core@2"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/tippy.js@6"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/aos@2.3.4/dist/aos.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/vanilla-tilt@1.7.0/dist/vanilla-tilt.min.js"></script>

<!-- Additional CSS for Fancy Hover Effects and Dynamic Styling -->
<style>
  /* Animated Gradient Background for the Page */
  body {
    font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
    background: linear-gradient(270deg, #f6f9fc, #e9eff5, #f6f9fc, #e9eff5);
    background-size: 800% 800%;
    animation: gradientAnimation 20s ease infinite;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 20px;
    color: #333;
  }
  @keyframes gradientAnimation {
    0% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
    50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
    100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
  }
  
  /* Hero Heading Enhancements */
  #hero-heading {
    text-align: left;
    margin: 2rem 0;
    animation: fadeSlide 1.5s ease-out;
  }
  @keyframes fadeSlide {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-20px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  #hero-heading p {
    font-size: 1.3em;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  }
  
  /* List Styling with Professional Icons and Bounce Effect */
  #hero-heading ul {
    padding-left: 1.5rem;
    margin: 1rem 0;
  }
  #hero-heading li {
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 1.5em;
    animation: bounceIn 0.8s ease;
    /* Enable VanillaTilt on list items */
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  #hero-heading li:before {
    content: '★';
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    color: #4A90E2;
    font-size: 1.2em;
    animation: pulseStar 1.5s infinite;
  }
  @keyframes pulseStar {
    0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.8; }
    50% { transform: scale(1.3); opacity: 1; }
    100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.8; }
  }
  @keyframes bounceIn {
    0% { transform: translateY(-10px); opacity: 0; }
    60% { transform: translateY(5px); opacity: 1; }
    100% { transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  
  /* Fancy Tooltip Term Hover Effects */
  .tooltip-term {
    color: #007BFF;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: bold;
    text-decoration: underline;
    transition: color 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease, text-shadow 0.3s ease;
  }
  .tooltip-term:hover {
    color: #ff4081;
    transform: translateY(-5px) scale(1.15) rotate(2deg);
    text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255, 64, 129, 0.8);
  }
  
  /* Profile Image Pizzazz (for Jolla Template) */
  .jolla-about .profile-image {
    border: 5px solid;
    border-image-slice: 1;
    border-width: 5px;
    border-image-source: linear-gradient(45deg, #4A90E2, #50b3a2);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
  }
  .jolla-about .profile-image:hover {
    transform: scale(1.08) rotate(1deg);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  }
</style>

<!-- Initialize AOS for Scroll Animations -->
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    AOS.init({ duration: 1000, once: true });
  });
</script>


```




```{=html}
<!-- About Page Content with Enhanced Hover and Scroll Effects -->
<div id="hero-heading" data-aos="fade-up">
  <p>
    <strong>Abdelkarim el Ghani</strong> is a Statistical Data Analyst at 
    <a href="https://www.eur.nl/" target="_blank">Erasmus University Rotterdam</a>.
    Specializing in data analytics, neuroscience, and modern web development, he leverages cutting-edge techniques to drive innovation.
  </p>

  <ul>
    <li data-aos="fade-right" data-aos-delay="100" data-tilt>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="data-analysis">Statistical Data Analysis</span>
    </li>
    <li data-aos="fade-right" data-aos-delay="200" data-tilt>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="neuroscience">Neuroscience</span>
    </li>
    <li data-aos="fade-right" data-aos-delay="300" data-tilt>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="open-science">Open Science Practices</span>
    </li>
  </ul>

  <p data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="400">
    Combining scientific research with innovative digital solutions, his work pushes the boundaries of what is possible.
  </p>

  <ul>
    <li data-aos="fade-left" data-aos-delay="500" data-tilt>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="programming">Web Development</span>
    </li>
    <li data-aos="fade-left" data-aos-delay="600" data-tilt>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="data-visualization">Data Visualization</span>
    </li>
    <li data-aos="fade-left" data-aos-delay="700" data-tilt>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="reproducible-research">Reproducible Research</span>
    </li>
  </ul>

  <p data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="800">
    Hover over any term to learn more about his areas of expertise.
  </p>
</div>

<!-- Hidden Tooltip Content -->
<div style="display: none;">
  <div id="data-analysis">
    Converting complex datasets into actionable insights using advanced statistical techniques.
  </div>
  <div id="neuroscience">
    Investigating the intricacies of brain function to better understand human behavior.
  </div>
  <div id="open-science">
    Advocating for transparency and collaboration in scientific research.
  </div>
  <div id="programming">
    Developing robust, modern websites and interactive applications with the latest technologies.
  </div>
  <div id="data-visualization">
    Crafting clear and compelling visual representations that translate data into meaningful stories.
  </div>
  <div id="reproducible-research">
    Implementing systematic workflows that ensure every finding is verifiable and impactful.
  </div>
</div>





```




```{=html}
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    // Initialize Tippy.js for each tooltip term with advanced settings
    const terms = document.querySelectorAll('.tooltip-term');
    terms.forEach((term, index) => {
      tippy(term, {
        content(reference) {
          const id = reference.getAttribute('data-template');
          const template = document.getElementById(id);
          return template ? template.innerHTML : '';
        },
        allowHTML: true,
        theme: 'light',
        animation: 'scale',
        arrow: true,
        interactive: true,
        // Custom delays: 150ms before showing, 100ms before hiding
        delay: [150, 100],
        // Custom duration for show/hide animations: [300ms for showing, 250ms for hiding]
        duration: [300, 250],
        trigger: 'mouseenter focus',
        // Stagger the appearance slightly based on index, if desired
        onShow(instance) {
          // Optionally adjust timing further for each tooltip if needed
          return true;
        }
      });
    });
  });
</script>





```
